pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 58-68: Explicit PATCH calls disable recording (isEnabled=false) for both cameras. Lines 61 and 67 confirm with echo statements.

setup_task.sh lines 70-74: Only the Entrance Camera has recording enabled via enable_recording_for_camera call. Line 73 confirms with echo statement 'Recording ENABLED for Entrance Camera (baseline)'.

Verified in multiple files: task.json description, README.md lines 16/27/38/54, verifier.py lines 13/116/124/126, export_result.sh line 57. The layout name is checked case-insensitively in export_result.sh.
Verified in task.json (line 19), verifier.py line 141 (passed = score >= 60), and README.md line 30 (Pass threshold row shows 60).

privileged_info_summary: The recording_compliance_audit task is a compliance audit scenario for a Nx Witness Video Management System. Three synthetic test cameras are set up: Parking Lot Camera and Server Room Camera with recording disabled, and Entrance Camera with recording enabled. The task requires the agent to audit all cameras, enable 24/7 continuous recording (with 'always' recording type and coverage for all 7 days) on all disabled cameras, and create a shared monitoring layout named 'Compliance Audit View' containing all three cameras. The success criteria has a pass threshold of 60 points out of 100 total possible points.
